ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "idProduct" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item" TEXT /* Name or description of the product */,
  "barCode" TEXT /* Barcode of the product */,
  "cc" TEXT /* Additional product code or identifier */,
  "idFamily" INTEGER /* Reference to the product family */,
  "idVat" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax code */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Internal reference code for the product */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key for the product */,
  "idStore" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the product is located */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product (if applicable) */,
  "unitPrice" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "productCode" TEXT /* Product code for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idProduct"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_idVat FOREIGN KEY ("idVat") REFERENCES tax_codes ("idVat"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_idFamily FOREIGN KEY ("idFamily") REFERENCES product_families ("idFamily"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_idStore FOREIGN KEY ("idStore") REFERENCES stores ("idStore")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_families" (
  "idFamily" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the product family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idFamily")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_codes" (
  "idVat" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax code */,
  "tax_code" TEXT /* Tax code value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idVat")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "idStore" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idStore")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "idFamily" INTEGER /* Reference to the product family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_idFamily FOREIGN KEY ("idFamily") REFERENCES product_families ("idFamily")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "idProduct" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_idProduct FOREIGN KEY ("idProduct") REFERENCES products ("idProduct")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory level */,
  "idProduct" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "idStore" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_idProduct FOREIGN KEY ("idProduct") REFERENCES products ("idProduct"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_idStore FOREIGN KEY ("idStore") REFERENCES stores ("idStore")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "idProduct" INTEGER /* Reference to the product involved in the movement */,
  "idStore" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the movement occurred */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory movement */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., stock in, stock out) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products involved in the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_idStore FOREIGN KEY ("idStore") REFERENCES stores ("idStore"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_idProduct FOREIGN KEY ("idProduct") REFERENCES products ("idProduct")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that has this permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., low stock, new order) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "idProduct" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_idProduct FOREIGN KEY ("idProduct") REFERENCES products ("idProduct")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "idProduct" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "idStore" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_idStore FOREIGN KEY ("idStore") REFERENCES stores ("idStore"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_idProduct FOREIGN KEY ("idProduct") REFERENCES products ("idProduct")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low stock, inventory discrepancy) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
